LanguageData.VFEFactory_BurnApparel.description: Burn unwanted apparel to completely destroy it.
LanguageData.VFEFactory_BurnApparel.label: burn apparel
LanguageData.VFEFactory_BurnDrug.description: Burn unwanted drugs to completely destroy them.
LanguageData.VFEFactory_BurnDrug.label: burn drugs
LanguageData.VFEFactory_BurnWeapon.description: Burn unwanted weapon to completely destroy it.
LanguageData.VFEFactory_BurnWeapon.label: burn weapon
LanguageData.VFEFactory_CremateAnimal.description: Cremate an animal corpse to completely destroy it.
LanguageData.VFEFactory_CremateAnimal.label: cremate animal
LanguageData.VFEFactory_CremateEntities.description: Cremate an entity's corpse to completely destroy it.
LanguageData.VFEFactory_CremateEntities.label: cremate entity
LanguageData.VFEFactory_CremateHumanlike.description: Cremate a human corpse to completely destroy it.
LanguageData.VFEFactory_CremateHumanlike.label: cremate human
LanguageData.VFEFactory_CremateHumanoidHybrids.descri: Cremate a humanoid hybrid's corpse to completely destroy it.
LanguageData.VFEFactory_CremateHumanoidHybrids.label: cremate humanoid hybrid
LanguageData.VFEFactory_CremateHybrids.description: Cremate a paragon or hybrid's corpse to completely destroy it.
LanguageData.VFEFactory_CremateHybrids.label: cremate paragon or hybrid
